productSlice.name: Microfish normal-user intake + analysis slice
productSlice.brief: Build a local Microfish slice for a normal first-time user, not an expert operator. The user should paste messy notes, click one obvious action, receive a plain-language analysis of people/topics/risks/next step, optionally inspect advanced details, return later without losing state, and download JSON.
requiredOutcomes: A normal first-time user understands the first action in under 10 seconds.
The first result is reachable with one primary action after notes are provided.
The result uses plain language before technical terms: people, topics, risks, next step.
Advanced ontology/provider/runtime details are available but progressively disclosed.
Changed notes visibly change the analysis.
JSON download/export works and includes both user-facing summary and structured details.
The implementation uses TypeScript/framework or documents a real environment blocker, and separates domain, storage, provider, export, and UI concerns.
constraints: Local-only; no external sends, no public deploy, no credential use unless explicitly configured.
No destructive filesystem actions outside output directory.
Missing OpenAI/Zep/OASIS credentials should be hidden from first-run UX and honestly explained in advanced details.
Do not silently collapse to a one-file vanilla JS app unless framework setup is genuinely blocked and documented.
forbiddenShortcuts: Expert dashboard as the first screen.
Jargon above the fold: ontology, deterministic, provider, runtime, adapter, payload.
Hardcoded output that ignores user notes.
One huge file containing UI, domain, storage, provider, and export logic without explanation.

budget.unblockPolicy: Build local deterministic product; ask only for credentials/external/destructive/irreversible blockers; document framework install blockers instead of silently flattening architecture.

criticalRegressions: normal user cannot identify first action in under 10 seconds
first screen is an expert dashboard
core notes -> analysis -> download loop cannot be completed
technical/provider jargon dominates before first result
architecture collapses into one large file without documented blocker
